nodes.name: 欧洲小雨燕
nodes.summary: 欧洲小雨燕（Little swift，学名 Apus affinis），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于约翰·爱德华·格雷、西亚，常见栖息地包括峡谷峭壁，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏。

nodes.name: 约翰·爱德华·格雷
nodes.summary: 约翰·爱德华·格雷是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联4种鸟类，包括长嘴剑鸻、欧洲小雨燕、鳞喉啄木鸟等4种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 西亚
nodes.summary: 西亚是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联11种鸟类，包括小鸨、巨鹭、欧洲小雨燕等11种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 峡谷峭壁
nodes.summary: 大型猛禽和食腐鸟偏好的高崖栖息环境。

links.key: bird-欧洲小雨燕-3ca19c80__distributed_in__loc-约翰-爱德华-格雷-d3ba7764
links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The little swift (Apus affinis) is a small species of swift found in Africa and southwestern Asia, and are vagrants and local breeders in southern Europe

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The little swift (Apus affinis) is a small species of swift found in Africa and southwestern Asia, and are vagrants and local breeders in southern Europe

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: They are found both in urban areas and at rocky cliffs where they build nests in a way typical of all members of the order Apodiformes

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: This species has a wide distribution and its population is increasing, and as a result is classified as "Least Concern" by the International Union for Conservation of Nature and Natural Resources. The population of the species is expanding and increasing, mainly due to its tendency to build nests in man-made structures. However, in Turkey a local decline of about 50% was observed due to habitat loss resulting from dam construction
